events.name: 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart were held to a 1-1 draw at home against Cologne on Saturday as they missed their chance to close in on Bayern Munich in second place in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart remain third after 1-1 Cologne draw

video.headline: Cologne dent Stuttgart's UCL dream with draw

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Cologne dent Stuttgart’s UCL dream with draw) 2024/02/24 US ONLY

headlines.description: Harry Kane struck twice, including a stoppage-time winner, to guide Bayern Munich to a 2-1 victory over RB Leipzig on Saturday, snapping a three-game losing run in all competitions and staying eight points off leaders Bayer Leverkusen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane rescues Bayern with late winner vs. Leipzig

video.headline: Kane gets his brace as Bayern retake the lead

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Kane gets his brace as Bayern retake the lead) 2024/02/24 ESHEET
